// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: HashTableCompact
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{

    private static int Length(string str) => str.Length;
    private static uint ReadU16(ReadOnlySpan<byte> ptr, int offset) => Unsafe.ReadUnaligned<ushort>(ref Unsafe.Add(ref MemoryMarshal.GetReference(ptr), offset));

    [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Auto)]
    private struct E
    {
        internal string Key;
        internal ulong HashCode;
        internal E(string key, ulong hashCode)
        {
            Key = key;
        HashCode = hashCode;
    }
    };

    private static readonly byte[] _bucketStarts = new byte[] {
        0, 1, 3
    };

    private static readonly byte[] _bucketCounts = new byte[] {
        1, 2, 0
    };

    private static readonly E[] _entries = {
        new E("aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa", 9198652691199425319ul), new E("a", 18225461187723808291ul), new E("item", 16750939634977259983ul)
    };

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    private static ulong Hash(string value, int length)
    {
        unchecked
        {
        ReadOnlySpan<byte> data = MemoryMarshal.AsBytes(value.AsSpan());
        int offset = 0;
        ulong hash = 352654597ul;
        while ((length > 0))
        {
         hash = ((((hash << 5) | (hash >> 27)) + hash) ^ (ulong)ReadU16(data, offset));
         offset += 2;
         length -= 2;
        }

        hash = (352654597ul + (hash * 1566083941ul));

        return hash;
        }
    }

    
    public static bool Contains(string key)
    {
        int length = Length(key);


        ulong hash = Hash(key, length * 2);
        int index = (int)(hash % 3);
        int start = (int)_bucketStarts[index];
        int count = (int)_bucketCounts[index];
        int end = start + count;

        for (int i = start; i < end; i++)
        {
            ref E entry = ref _entries[i];

            if (entry.HashCode == hash && StringComparer.Ordinal.Equals(entry.Key, key))
                return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 3;
    public const int MinKeyLength = 1;
    public const int MaxKeyLength = 255;
    public const bool HasNumber = false;
    public const bool HasUppercase = false;
    public const bool HasLowercase = true;
    public const bool HasSymbol = false;
    public const bool HasWhitespace = false;
}
